name: Rebel Supply Line
description: Establish a covert supply network that provides steady income after each mission.
flavorText: The Alliance logistics corps works miracles with limited resources.

name: Field Hospital
description: Reduce the cost of medical recovery for wounded heroes.
flavorText: Bacta is expensive, but a good medic stretches every drop.

name: Hidden Weapons Cache
description: Stockpile munitions to start each mission with a free frag grenade.
flavorText: Tucked behind a false wall in a cantina basement.

name: Informant Network
description: A web of contacts reveals enemy deployment zones before each mission.
flavorText: Everyone has a price. The trick is knowing who to ask.

name: Smuggler Contacts
description: Connections in the underworld reduce shop prices.
flavorText: No questions asked. Credits up front.

name: Advanced Supply Line
description: Upgrade the supply network for higher credit income and a stim pack each mission.
flavorText: Full logistics operation, with medical supplies on every shipment.

name: Imperial Slicing Backdoor
description: Slice into Imperial comms to delay reinforcement waves.
flavorText: Their encryption is good. Ours is better.

name: Tactical Training Program
description: Drill your team to draw an extra tactic card at mission start.

name: Rebel Safe House
description: A hidden base that reduces Imperial threat each mission.
flavorText: If the Empire finds this place, we lose everything.

name: Black Market Access
description: Deep underworld connections grant major shop discounts.
flavorText: The Hutts remember their friends. And their enemies.

name: Veteran Instructors
description: Experienced Rebel officers mentor your team, granting bonus XP per mission.
flavorText: They survived Scarif. They can teach you to survive anything.

name: Rebel Intelligence Cell
description: Full intelligence operation: reveal enemies, delay reinforcements, and reduce threat.

name: Alliance War Chest
description: Massive Alliance funding provides substantial credit income and shop discounts.
flavorText: Mon Mothma authorized the full war budget.

name: Elite Commando Training
description: Top-tier military training: bonus XP, extra tactic cards, and a thermal detonator each mission.
flavorText: Pathfinders. The best of the best.
